title: Chewy Russian Cabbage Salad
description: A tangy, chewy salad perfect for a date night, featuring blanched potatoes, crisp cabbage, and an English mustard vinaigrette.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a rolling boil.
Add the cubed potatoes and blanch for 8 minutes until just tender.
Drain and rinse the potatoes with cold water to stop the cooking process; set aside to cool.
In a large mixing bowl, combine shredded cabbage, grated carrots, diced apple, and raisins.
In a small bowl, whisk together English mustard, apple cider vinegar, olive oil, honey, salt, and pepper until smooth.
Pour the vinaigrette over the salad and toss gently to coat all ingredients.
Add the blanched potatoes and chopped dill, and toss again lightly.
Season with additional salt or pepper if desired.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to let the flavors meld before serving.
